What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive training programs designed to help you excel in exams and build a successful career.

JST

JST

Junior School Teacher preparation with complete syllabus coverage and past papers.

PST

PST

Primary School Teacher exam prep with subject-wise study material and mock tests.

JEST

JEST

Junior Elementary School Teacher training with expert guidance and practice sessions.

STS

Sukkur IBA Testing Services preparation for various government job exams.

SPSC

Sindh Public Service Commission exam preparation with past paper analysis.

MDCAT

Medical and Dental College Admission Test preparation with full syllabus coverage.

5–15

BPS 5 to 15

Complete preparation for BPS-05 to BPS-15 government job exams across Sindh.

NTS

National Testing Service preparation for scholarships, admissions, and recruitment exams.

Years of Excellence

About Us

Meet Our Founder

Mujahid Ali

Founder & CEO — Education Academy

Education Academy was founded with a vision to empower Pakistani students with quality education, career guidance, and exam preparation. Under the leadership of Mujahid Ali, we have trained thousands of students across Sindh and beyond, helping them secure government jobs, scholarships, and admissions in top institutions. Our mission is to bridge the gap between talent and opportunity by providing accessible, affordable, and high-quality educational resources.

Our Faculty

Meet Our Faculty

Experienced educators dedicated to your success.

Nazeer Ahmed

Lead Instructor — Technical Education

Nazeer Ahmed brings years of experience in software development and technical education. Specializing in web technologies, programming languages, and exam preparation, making complex concepts simple for every student.

Success Stories

Our Achievements

A glimpse of our students who have achieved remarkable success in their academic and professional journeys.

Transforming Lives Through Education

Year after year, Education Academy students achieve remarkable success in competitive exams across Pakistan. From CSS and PMS to provincial public service commissions, our students consistently rank among the top candidates. We take pride in having helped hundreds of students from Khairpur Mirs and across Sindh secure government jobs, win scholarships, and gain admission to prestigious universities.
